signup.title: Sign up
signup.termsPrefix: By Signing up, you agree to our

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.description: This is the landing page. Update this section with your content.
landing.heroDesc: Track debts, financial relationships, and contacts — all in one platform. Simple, secure, and always accessible — even without the internet.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need to manage debts

debtBook.title: Debt Book
debtBook.desc: Accurately record all transactions. Track who owes you and who you owe in a single interface.

contactsManager.title: Contacts Manager
contactsManager.desc: Organize contacts with detailed profiles. Link debts directly to specific people.

offlineMode.title: Offline Mode
offlineMode.desc: Works offline. Your data is stored on your device and synchronized when connected.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Visual dashboards showing debt trends, payment history, and returns at a glance.

securePrivate.title: Secure & Private
securePrivate.desc: JWT authentication, encrypted storage, and official access secure your financial data.

multilanguage.title: Multi-language Support
multilanguage.desc: Use Adl 5:8 in English, Russian, or Tajik. Switch languages without losing any data.

landing.howItWorksHeading: Get started in four simple steps

step1.title: Simple Account
step1.desc: Sign up in seconds. No credit card required. Your data remains on your device.

step2.title: Add Debts
step2.desc: Record debts with contacts, amounts, dates, and notes. Sort them in tables.

step3.title: Track Progress
step3.desc: Monitor payments, view analytics, and gain insights into financial relationships.

step4.title: Stay Organized
step4.desc: Mark debts as paid, export reports, and maintain a clear history of all transactions.

cta.title: Are you ready to take control of your finances?
cta.desc: Join thousands of users who trust Adl 5:8 for organizing their financial records.

footer.desc: An efficient platform for managing debts. Track, organize, and control debts with confidence.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Page
dashboard.description: This is the dashboard page. View your key statistics and details here.

debts.title: Debts Page
debts.description: This is the debts page. Track and manage your debts here.

archive.title: Archive Page
archive.description: This is the archive page. View your archived items here.

contacts.title: Contacts Page
contacts.description: This is the contacts page. Find and manage your contacts here.

folders.title: Folders Page
folders.description: This is the folders page. Organize your files in folders here.

users.title: Users Page
users.description: This is the users page. View and manage user accounts here.

login.title: Log In Page
login.description: This is the log in page. Enter your credentials to access your account.

signup.title: Sign Up Page
signup.description: This is the sign up page. Create a new account to get started.
